summary: CapyMatch Kanban D&D UX Testing - All 7 features verified. Drag-and-drop polish working correctly: card lift with scale(1.03) rotate(0.5deg) and elevated shadow during drag, target lane activation with teal tint/border, drop settle animation with teal glow fade, toast notifications ('Moved to X'), column counts update. Cards have cursor:grab, hover translateY(-2px), click navigation works.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelinePage.js KanbanCard component correctly implements isActiveDrag detection with composed transforms (scale 1.03, rotate 0.5deg) when snapshot.isDragging && !snapshot.isDropAnimating
dragShadow style correctly applied: '0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.18), 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 0 0 1px rgba(13,148,136,0.1)'
Cursor correctly changes to 'grabbing' during drag via isActiveDrag ? 'grabbing' : 'grab'
Lane activation (isDraggingOver) applies teal background tint 'rgba(13,148,136,0.03)', border '1.5px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.12)', inner shadow 'inset 0 1px 12px rgba(13,148,136,0.05)'
Lane top bar glow: boxShadow '0 0 8px ${col.color}44' when isDraggingOver
justDroppedId state set for 500ms triggering 'kanban-card-settled' CSS class with teal glow fade animation
kanban-settle keyframe animation correctly defined: 0% box-shadow 3px teal glow → 100% normal shadow
handleDragEnd correctly sets justDroppedId, performs optimistic update, calls API, shows toast on success
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data. Note: Test moved Stanford from Added→Outreach and Florida Atlantic from Added→Talking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kanban D&D UX polish verified. All visual effects working: drag lift (scale+rotate+shadow), lane activation (teal tint/border/glow), drop settle animation (teal glow fade via kanban-card-settled class), toast notifications. Cards in current state: Added(1: TEST_Dup), Outreach(4: Stanford, U of Florida, Creighton), Talking(3: Emory, UCLA, Florida Atlantic), Visit(0), Offered(0). Login via keyboard Enter press after filling form, button click doesn't work reliably in Playwright.

verified_features.kanban_board_renders_5_lanes: ✅ PASS - Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offered all visible with colored top bars
verified_features.drag_card_lift_effect: ✅ PASS - Card elevates with scale(1.03), rotate(0.5deg), dragShadow during active drag
verified_features.cursor_grab_grabbing: ✅ PASS - cursor:grab default, cursor:grabbing during drag
verified_features.target_lane_activation: ✅ PASS - Lane gets teal background tint, border glow, top bar glow on isDraggingOver
verified_features.drop_settle_animation: ✅ PASS - kanban-card-settled CSS class applied for 500ms with teal glow fade keyframe animation
verified_features.toast_confirmation: ✅ PASS - 'Moved to Outreach', 'Moved to Talking' toasts appear after drop
verified_features.column_counts_update: ✅ PASS - Lane counts update after drag (e.g., Added 3→2, Outreach 2→3)
verified_features.card_click_navigation: ✅ PASS - Click on card navigates to /pipeline/{program_id}

pipeline_motion.css.pm_drop_settle_keyframe: Defined with teal glow fade animation 450ms
